notes: Phase 2 found many small blogs, old posts, Pinterest, and education resources ranking. Strong first niche if user can test and photograph projects.
Phase 2 found many local publishers, venue pages, Reddit, and weak exact-intent logistics queries. Strong runner-up; maintenance burden remains the main risk.
Good parent pain point and evergreen queries, but trust/sensitivity risk rises for topics like death, bodies, religion, money, and disasters.
Demand likely high, but competition is heavy from worksheet libraries, teachers, Pinterest, marketplaces, and established education publishers.
